explanations.1: This declares an XML file that defines custom UI elements (ribbons and buttons) for Microsoft Office applications.
explanations.4: The insertBeforeMso attribute places this custom tab before the standard Home tab in the ribbon interface.
explanations.6: Each callback attribute (onAction, getSelectedItemID, etc.) points to a VBA function that handles different dropdown interactions—for example, onAction runs when the user selects an item.
